$comment: Copy this file to budget.json and customize. budget.json is gitignored so your paths stay local.
$comment_alerting: E1.1: Out-of-band notifications via ntfy.sh. Set enabled: true and pick a topic to receive alerts when the dispatcher goes down. heartbeat_hours sends a periodic 'still healthy' ping (0 to disable).
$comment_engine_override: Override the scheduled task engine. 'node' = free models only, 'claude' = Claude Max, 'auto' = budget-adaptive (default). null = use -Engine parameter from scheduled task. Set via dashboard (node scripts/dashboard.mjs) or control CLI (node scripts/control.mjs).

monthly.$comment_target_burn_pct_per_day: Percent of monthly budget you intend to burn per day at steady-state pace. MUST be > 0 — a zero or missing value causes the estimator to fail closed with skip_reason: invalid-config-target_burn_pct_per_day.

$comment_free_model_roster: Maps task classes to free-tier models reached via PAL MCP. When a task matches a class with a non-null model, the dispatcher skips the Claude Code Task-tool subagent entirely and calls mcp__pal__<tool> directly — zero Claude Max tokens for the work itself. Only the thin orchestration layer uses Claude. Roster verified against PAL listmodels on 2026-04-11. NEVER add gemini-3-pro-preview — it bills separate Google Cloud credits, not free.

classes.$comment_slot_fill: Expands flagged subsections in worldbuilder content files against a schema. Needs strong reasoning for YAML structure + linguistics. Free-tier only.

free_model_roster.$comment_on_pal_error: skip (safest: log and move on) OR claude_fallback (run on Claude Max with warning, burns sub usage)
free_model_roster.$comment_project_overrides: Per-project model routing. Each key is a project slug. classes values can be strings (single model) or arrays (fallback chain, tried in order). audit_models specifies the model used for post-generation audit per task class. If absent, auto C-1 opposite-family logic applies.
free_model_roster.$comment_providers: OpenAI-compatible provider endpoints. base_url is the /v1 root. env_key is the environment variable holding the API key (null for local/no-auth). throttle_ms is the minimum interval between calls (0 for no throttle).

estimator_notes: Parses ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl for real Anthropic usage fields. Reserve floor is the real safety net — 2x estimator error still leaves reserve intact.

kill_switches.notes: Create empty file at pause_file path OR set paused:true above to halt dispatcher immediately. Either works.
